subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him. He openeth unto whomsoever He willeth the gates of bounty. He is, verily, the Single One, the All-Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو یفتح لمن یشاء ابواب الخیرات انه لهو الفرد المقتدر
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual transformation
